title: Golden Books
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
{{Redlink}}
[[File:GoldenBooks-Logo.png|thumb|right|250px|Golden Books]]
'''Golden Books''' is a publisher of children's books. Their ''[[Star Wars]]'' titles include:

==Legends==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images from Golden Books products}}
===''Star Wars'' film adaptations (Legends)===
====Complete films====
*[[Star Wars: A New Hope (Golden Book)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'']] (1997)
*[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (Golden Book)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'']] (1997)
*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (Golden Book)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] (1997)

*''[[Journey to Mos Eisley]]''
*''[[The Hoth Adventure]]''
*''[[Escape from Jabba's Palace]]''
